tasks.description: Scaffold Hub data + curation layer: HUB_FILE, load_hub/save_hub/update_hub with new curation schema keyed by full_name, legacy projects.json migration. Add functions only; do not remove old projects functions yet.
tasks.acceptance: load/save round-trip works with sample curation file; legacy schema migrates best-effort (full_name derived from repo_url, old status NOT mapped to status_override).

tasks.description: GitHub client (inline): fetch_all_repos (paginated /user/repos), fetch_recent_commits (per repo, 5 commits), classify_recency (H4), module cache _GH_CACHE (600s TTL, stale-while-revalidate). Token from GITHUB_TOKEN env, Authorization: token header. Never log/echo token.
tasks.acceptance: Pagination + commit fetch + recency classification work; 401/403/URLError return graceful sentinels; token never in logs/responses.

tasks.description: Ollama client (inline) + lazy /api/hub/summaries endpoint: call_ollama_generate (POST /api/generate stream:false, 20s timeout), get_project_summary (cache keyed by repo+SHAs, 30min/5min TTL, stampede guard), build_summary_prompt (injection guard), format_commit. Plus GET /api/hub/summaries computing missing summaries without blocking /hub.
tasks.acceptance: Summary produced+cached against available/stubbed Ollama; connection-refused returns null with raw-commits fallback; /api/hub/summaries fills cache without blocking page load.

tasks.description: Hub render (/hub): hub_page() merges GitHub data with curation layer by full_name, groups Active/Maintain/Stalled/Done (H4), renders cards with name/description/language/relative last-push/Ollama summary(or fallback)/goal/whats_next/links/attention flags. Empty state when GitHub unavailable + no curation.
tasks.acceptance: Renders grouped cards with sample merged data; attention flags (stalled/no goal/no next/done-but-active) show correctly; no token crash.

tasks.description: Hub admin (/hub/admin): hub_admin_page() auth-gated, lists repos with forms to edit goal/whats_next/status_override(done)/live_url/local_path/hidden/order, POSTing to update_hub actions. Reuse existing auth + form styling.
tasks.acceptance: Full curation round-trip via curl locally; unauthenticated GET/POST returns 403.

tasks.description: Hub Actions (allowlisted, H7): POST /hub/action/refresh (force-bust _GH_CACHE + summary cache) and POST /hub/action/backup (Python-native tarfile of DATA_DIR returned as octet-stream download). Both auth-gated. No shell passthrough.
tasks.acceptance: Refresh clears caches and re-polls; backup returns valid .tar.gz of DATA_DIR; unauthenticated returns 403.

tasks.description: Route wiring + nav + footer/homepage links + delete old surfaces + dead code: add /hub, /hub/admin, /hub/action/*, /api/hub/summaries; remove /projects, /projects/admin, /projects/admin/*, /portfolio. Update render_nav to Home/Briefings/Hub/Status. Fix footer in html_page() and homepage links in home_page() to /hub. Delete portfolio.html. Remove inject_nav() and portfolio_page().
tasks.acceptance: /hub 200; /portfolio + /projects* 404; nav+footer+homepage all point to /hub; no dead code remains.

tasks.description: Smoke + compile + local verify: py_compile all .py; run server.py 3102 with GITHUB_TOKEN unset (banner) and set; update scripts/smoke.py matrix per H12 and run green.
tasks.acceptance: py_compile clean; smoke green with updated matrix; Hub shows token-not-configured banner + curated-only when no token, no traceback.

tasks.description: Compose + OPERATIONS update (H9/H10): compose.yml add GITHUB_TOKEN secret mount + OLLAMA_BASE_URL/OLLAMA_MODEL env + network for Ollama. OPERATIONS.md document token provisioning + Ollama env + Hub.
tasks.acceptance: docker compose config --quiet passes; OPERATIONS documents Hub + secrets + Ollama.

tasks.description: Definition-of-done check + STATE.md log (no deploy): walk all DoD items; update STATE.md log. Do NOT deploy unless explicitly requested.
tasks.acceptance: All DoD items verified locally; STATE.md log updated; no deploy performed.
